discrepancies.title: Verdict-label nonconformance with packet 130 §11 5-bin ladder
discrepancies.description: Synth returned label 'GO_ROUTE_F_FIXED_POINT_DISTINGUISHED' which is not literally one of the 5 ladder bins specified in packet 130 §11. The closest match is Bin 1 ('UPGRADE_FULL_VIA_D7_DEGENERATION_DIAGNOSIS'). Synth's label is a strict enhancement: in addition to the D_6 -> D_7 degeneration diagnosis (Bin 1 payload), synth identifies V_quad as sitting at the s_1 fixed point within the surviving A_1^{(1)} factor under the reduced W_a-tilde(A_1) symmetry. This is a structural payload extension, not a deviation. Routing to bridge as Bin-1-equivalent (Tier 3 GO) per packet §11 cascade.
discrepancies.remediation: No remediation required. Documented as ENHANCED MATCH to Bin 1 in q4_v2_verdict.md header. Future verdict packets may include 'enhanced match' provision in the ladder rubric to pre-authorize structural-payload extensions.
